verified_description: Your account is already verified. You can now sign in normally.
invalid_description: The verification link is invalid or has expired. If you want, we can send you a new one.
pending_description: We have sent you a verification link. Open your inbox and confirm your account to continue.
missing_email: We do not have an email to resend the verification to.
resend_error: We could not resend the email.
hero_description: We want to make sure the email is yours before activating access. As soon as you verify it, you will be able to continue normally.
